task: Use the seeded mechanical handoff package to implement the electronics portion for the single-motor diverter gate. Keep the design on one 12V DC supply with at most 2.0A available, route both power and return wires through the left-wall cable corridor, and update the seeded artifacts so the electronics handoff can pass review.
expected_criteria: Electronics engineer starts from seeded planner and coder artifacts, adds a valid single-motor power path, and preserves the routing constraints in the workspace files.
